def positive_loop_run_until_complete_inside_running_loop():
    rule_id = "loop_run_until_complete_inside_running_loop"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "loop.run_until_complete called from within a running event loop, which raises RuntimeError."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
